name: system-health
description: ~/.claude/ health dashboard with dependency graph and usage trends. Scans installed skills, builds dependency graph, checks filesystem health, surfaces skill usage analytics with behavioral topology overlay, invokes waza for config hygiene.

name: templates
description: Work item, doc triplet, and skill authoring templates for doc-first development. Scaffolds features, defects, tasks, user stories, and new skills with type-aware artifact sets.

name: docs
description: Doc intelligence: generate narrative docs (PHILOSOPHY.md, OVERVIEW.md) with claims sidecar for staleness detection. Work item validation, structural completeness enforcement, tree report, and graph artifact. Runtime dependency on gstack /document-release for post-ship workflow.

name: company-workflow
description: Company work item specification with structural validation. Validates tracker files and work item directories against company templates, contract.json, and company-artifact-manifests.json.
